hasAttributes.name: SLAKPIInstanceId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the SLA KPI Instance.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: Type a descriptive name for the service level agreement (SLA) key performance indicator (KPI) instance.

hasAttributes.name: failureTime
hasAttributes.description: Enter the date and time when the service level agreement (SLA) key performance indicator (KPI) will expire.

hasAttributes.name: ownerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of owner, either User or Team.

hasAttributes.name: regarding
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the record that this service level agreement (SLA) key performance indicator (KPI) instance is associated with.

hasAttributes.name: status
hasAttributes.description: Reason for the status of the service level agreement (SLA) key performance indicator (KPI) instance. For example, the SLA KPI could be Noncompliant or Succeeded.

hasAttributes.name: succeededOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the service level agreement (SLA) key performance indicator (KPI) success criteria was met.

hasAttributes.name: warningTime
hasAttributes.description: Enter the date and time when the service level agreement (SLA) key performance indicator (KPI)will go to a warning state.

hasAttributes.name: transactionCurrencyId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the local currency for the record to make sure budgets are reported in the correct currency.

hasAttributes.name: warningTimeReached
hasAttributes.description: Shows information about whether the case has reached its warning time.

definitions.description: Service level agreement (SLA) key performance indicator (KPI) instance that is tracked for an individual case
